mainText:
Good morning. Here's your Breeze communications briefing for Thursday, March 26.

Starting with Breeze coverage.
Simple Flying published a route expansion piece covering Breeze's new nonstop service announcements. Tone was positive, highlighting underserved market strategy.
No negative Breeze mentions in the last 24 hours across monitored outlets.

Now for industry and competitor news.
Delta announced capacity cuts on three regional routes, citing softening demand in secondary markets.
F.A.A. released updated guidance on airport slot allocation that could affect ULCC scheduling flexibility.
Southwest leadership reshuffled its communications team following last week's investor day messaging concerns.

That's your briefing. Roger is standing by when you're ready to take action on any of these stories.
